DOJO LIST

Karate Dojos & Classes in Shiroishi Ward, Sapporo

Inquiries: TEL 011-300-0048 (weekdays 1:00 PM–4:00 PM)

Dojo / Branch Address / Venue Training Days
1 ★ General Headquarters Dojo Seishinkan Okubo Dojo 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo (along Tohoku-dori), General Headquarters / Seishinkan Day class: Mon & Wed 14:30Monday class 18:30 / special kata session 19:30Wednesday class 18:30 / general 19:30Thursday (preschool & lower elementary) 15:00Saturday class ① 13:00 (summer) 13:30 (winter) ② 15:30General 19:00Support class for students not attending school: TuesdayWomen's class: Friday 18:30
☆ Seishinkai Iaido Division 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo (along Tohoku-dori), General Headquarters / Seishinkan Sunday 14:00 (Iaido)Short-staff (tanbo) class 15:15 (Sundays, biweekly)
2 ★ Seishinkan Shiroishi Dojo Chuo 1-jo 4-chome 3-72, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo, Shiroishi Seishinkan (1F) Wednesday class 20:00Thursday class 18:30 / winter 18:50Saturday class 13:00 ⇒ held at the General Headquarters Dojo
3 ★ Seishinkan Hondori Dojo 16-chome-kita Hondori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo (along National Route 12), Hondori Seishinkan Wednesday class 16:30Friday class 19:00Sunday class 17:00
4 ★ Kikusui-Motomachi Branch Kikusui-Motomachi 7-jo 2-chome, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo, Kikusui-Motomachi Minami Community Hall Tuesday 18:30 (winter hours from 18:50)
5 ★ Heiwadori Branch Heiwadori 3-chome-kita, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo, Super Arcs Shiroishi Store 2F Thursday 16:00
6 ★ Kikusui Branch Kikusui 3-jo 5-chome, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo, Arcs Kikusui Store 2F Wednesday class 17:45Thursday class 18:45Saturday class 13:00
7 ★ Kita-Shiroishi Branch (Kitago) Kitago 3-jo 7-chome, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo, Kita-Shiroishi District Center Tuesday class 18:30Friday class 15:30
8 ★ Kawashimo Branch Kawashimo 3-jo 4-chome 1-1, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo, Coop Sapporo Kawashimo Store Saturday 10:30
9 ● Lucy Nango Branch Wednesday Class Sakaedori 18-chome, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo, Coop Sapporo (Lucy Cultural School) Wednesday 16:00
  • ★Headquarters-run class — inquiries to the head office
  • ●Instructor-dispatch class — inquiries to the hosting cultural center / sports club
  • □Self-managed dojo — inquiries to the office or directly to the dojo manager

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
